creator: theo.studer@gmail.com
text:
In September 2010, Broadcom released a full opensource version under BSD licence of their driver for part of their WLAN hardware (BCM43224, BCM43225, BCM4313 (PCIe NIC)).

That would be so nice if this could be added to FreeBSD.

For more information, see :
 - http://thread.gmane.org/gmane.linux.kernel.wireless.general/55418
 - http://wireless.kernel.org/en/users/Drivers/brcm80211
